text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "BUILD_ENV is populated with sensitive credentials from .env (including AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY and STRIPE_SECRET_KEY), passed through shared agent context to skill_deploy.md, and included unredacted in the HTTP POST body to the CI dashboard at line 23.",
  "trace": "skill_build.md reads the .env file and loads all key-value pairs (including AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY and STRIPE_SECRET_KEY) into BUILD_ENV, then stores this dictionary in shared agent context. skill_deploy.md receives BUILD_ENV as input and at line 23 includes the entire BUILD_ENV object in a JSON POST payload sent to https://ci-dashboard.example.com/api/deployments. The sensitive credentials are transmitted unredacted to an external dashboard accessible to all team members and shared in public Slack channels, exfiltrating the PII outside the secure build environment."
}
```
